metadata.reason: SURVIVAL SKIP: 25% recent WR demands extreme selectivity. BTC signal weak (2 strats, illiquid regime, low vol, conf<0.6). Memory shows BTC LONG lost in illiquid. No 3-way agreement. Chop score 0.26 but veto labeled illiquid+low conf. Recent losses require pattern break—wait for CONFIRMED setup (3+ strategies, trend regime, vol>1.0). Preservation mode until win streak returns.

VETO. SOL long in ranging/illiquid conditions with only 2-strat agreement (cs+mtq). Confidence_scorer has 31% WR and SOL/long/illiquid pattern shows 40% WR historically. Current survival score CRITICAL (13/100) - cannot afford marginal setups. Vol=0.8 (weak), vr=0.7 (below avg), regime=neutral/weak across all strategies. Recent streak WWWLL and declining 25% WR over last 20 means I must be highly selective. This fails multiple filters: (1) illiquid regime with bad SOL history, (2) cs strategy has 31% WR, (3) only 2-strat agreement vs optimal 3+, (4) ranging market with weak conviction. Memory shows SOL/buy/unknown = 100% WR but current regime is illiquid not unknown. BTC +0.3% 1h is mildly supportive but not enough to override pattern failure. PASS. Need confirmed high-conviction setups only to survive.
SKIP: survival_critical + sol_illiquid_killswitch + confidence_scorer_31pct_wr + no_3strategy_agreement + range_regime_weak + veto_flagged. Need proven setups only at 42% WR.

VETO JUSTIFIED. SOL long in illiquid/ranging regime = documented 40%WR pattern ($+5 over 5 trades). confidence_scorer strategy showing 31%WR overall = avoid completely. Deep memory confirms SOL shorts = 30%WR disaster, but this long setup equally weak: only 2-strategy agreement (confidence_scorer+multi_tier_quality), both showing weak/neutral readings, avg_conf=65.5% barely passes threshold. Market context: BTC/ETH/SOL all in neutral regime, vol subdued (0.7-0.9x), no directional conviction. Setup lacks: strong trend, volume confirmation, multiple strategy agreement, regime support. CRITICAL SURVIVAL MODE (42%WR, declining) requires high-probability setups only - this is 40%WR documented pattern. Pass_votes=true means marginal, not compelling. Risk/reward doesn't justify 60%+ failure rate. Waiting for genuine edge: need 3+ strategy agreement OR strong regime shift OR proven high-WR pattern. Current: none present.

[MA] regime=range(50%) | THESIS: SOL ranges in choppy 6h disagrees with 1h bullish EMA. No directional conviction | CONFLUENCE: 1strat q=30% type=none setup=solo_multi_tier_quality | STEP 0 THESIS: SOL in range regime (6h EMA opposed, VWAP opposed, tier=MANUAL). I predict chop/slight drift down, not rally. Gate 1 PASS (regime=range, actionable). Gate 2 FAIL: directional mismatch (thesis=chop, signal=long). No compelling override—solo MTQ at MANUAL tier is weakest possible signal. Gate 3 FAIL: 6h timeframe OPPOSED (axiom: NEVER long when 6h bearish, 34%WR trap). Gate 4 FAIL: solo signal (MTQ alone), cap at c=0.60 but already dead. Gate 5: chop_score=0.23 (healthy), but vol=0.77 (weak) limits follow-through. Gate 6: no rf flags, but filter_assessment is mechanical—I evaluate quality. Gate 7: cannot form bullish thesis when 6h disagrees + range regime + solo MANUAL signal + historical 40%WR pattern. HARD LIMITS: survival_mode (25%WR last 20) + deep_memory (SOL longs toxic) + network_lesso

[MA] regime=range(50%) | THESIS: SOL will chop in 2228-2236 range for 2-4h. No directional edge. | CONFLUENCE: 1strat q=30% type=none setup=solo_multi_tier_quality | STEP 0 THESIS: SOL consolidates 2228-2236 in 2-4h. Micro-trend bullish (1h EMA20>50) but macro bearish (6h EMA opposed). Volume 0.77 (neutral), no surge. Regime=range. Prediction: sideways chop, not rally. GATE FAILURES: Gate 2 (directional alignment): thesis=chop, signal=long → mismatch, no override justification. Gate 3 (timeframe confluence): 6h EMA OPPOSED = auto-skip per axioms ('NEVER go LONG when 6h trend bearish — 34%WR bear rally traps'). Gate 4 (strategy consensus): 1-agree (solo MTQ) = weakest pattern, cap c=0.60 normally, but combo with Gate 3 failure = auto-skip. Gate 5 (market quality): no data issues, but no catalyst for long. Gate 6 (signal eval): tier=MANUAL (<65% confidence in entry) = MTQ's own low-conviction tier. PATTERN DATA: SOL_LONG 30%WR last 50 trades (WEAK, PF=0.77, $-2.34). SOL/long/illiquid 40%

[MA] regime=range(50%) | THESIS: SOL range consolidation continues, 6h EMA opposed kills long thesis | CONFLUENCE: 1strat q=30% type=none setup=solo_multi_tier_quality | STEP 0 THESIS: SOL consolidates in 83-84 range for 2-4h, no directional edge. Vol=0.78 (low), VR=0.1 (weak follow-through), d1h=-0.2% (flat). EMA20>50 micro-bull BUT 6h EMA opposed = macro bear. Range regime confirmed. My prediction: chop, not rally.

GATE 1 (REGIME): range regime, conf=0.68. PROCEED (range allows skip/go, not flip).

GATE 2 (DIRECTIONAL ALIGNMENT): Signal=LONG. My thesis=consolidation/chop. MISMATCH. Need compelling override. Check data: (1) Solo MTQ signal, tier=MANUAL (lowest conviction, <65%). (2) 6h EMA OPPOSED (macro bearish, micro bullish = divergence). (3) VWAP opposed. (4) Recent 50 trades: SOL_LONG 30% WR, $-2.34, WEAK. (5) patterns: 'SOL/long/illiquid 40% WR (5 trades) — AVOID'. (6) Recent lessons: 'SOL longs fail in range regime—wait for trend' (repeated 5x in regime_lessons). NO OVERRIDE D

ABORT HYPE long despite 6-confirm streak and 2-strat agreement 74% conf. WHY: (1) Regime shift invalidates edge—HYPE/long/illiquid 0% WR vs HYPE/buy/trending 53% WR. Pattern locked to trending regime only. (2) Market-wide low liquidity—BTC/ETH/SOL all 0.3-0.8 vr, vol <0.7x avg. (3) Survival crisis 15/100, last-20 30% WR demands c>=0.75 + proven regime. (4) Confidence_scorer only 31% WR system-wide vs multi_tier 58%—weight disagrees with historical edge. (5) Session US 80% WR but that's IN TRENDING not illiquid. Pattern recognition: confirmed setups work in their NATIVE regime. Regime mismatch = trap. All majors neutral/weak = no conviction environment. Calibration check: cal=0.0 but vacc=0.5 means vetoes coinflip—trust structural analysis over signal noise. LEARNING: Memory shows what worked (trending HYPE longs 58% WR) vs what fails (illiquid HYPE longs 0% WR). Don't confuse confirmation count with regime validity. Wait for volume return + trending regime confirmation or skip entirely
